testcase.name: defaultConfigurationAvailable
testcase.system-out:
21:55:32.235 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.gl.configserver.ConfigServerApplicationTests]: ConfigServerApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:55:32.396 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.gl.configserver.ConfigServerApplication for test class com.gl.configserver.ConfigServerApplicationTests
